script: (function(){ var result = {}; result.url = location.href; result.scrollY = window.scrollY; result.innerHeight = window.innerHeight; var sections = document.querySelectorAll('section, div[class*="section"], div[class*="container"], div[class*="feeds"], div[class*="Feeds"]'); result.sections = Array.from(sections).slice(0,20).map(function(e){ var r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); return { tag: e.tagName, className: (e.className||'').toString().substring(0,100), id: e.id||'', visible: r.width > 0 && r.height > 0, x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height), text: (e.innerText||'').substring(0,50).replace(/\n/g,' ') }; }); var noteItems = document.querySelectorAll('section.note-item'); result.noteItems = Array.from(noteItems).slice(0,5).map(function(e){ var r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); return { className: (e.className||'').toString().substring(0,80), x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height), visible: r.width > 0 && r.height > 0 }; }); var aiElements = document.querySelectorAll('[class*="ai"], [class*="Ai"], [class*="AI"], [class*="diandian"], [class*="summarize"], [class*="answer"]'); result.aiElements = Array.from(aiElements).slice(0,15).map(function(e){ var r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); return { tag: e.tagName, className: (e.className||'').toString().substring(0,100), visible: r.width > 0 && r.height > 0, x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height), text: (e.innerText||'').substring(0,80).replace(/\n/g,' ') }; }); return result; })()
